description_long: This skateboard features a standard double-kick deck with a black grippy surface on top, likely made from grip tape, and a yellow edge outlining the deck. The deck is flat with upturned nose and tail, suitable for performing tricks. The skateboard is supported by four cylindrical wheels, each with a yellow body and a red core, attached to metal trucks beneath the deck. The trucks are mounted in a traditional configuration, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible graphics or logos on the deck or wheels. The construction appears robust, typical for street or park skateboarding in urban environments.
description: A minimalistic skateboard with a black grip-taped deck, yellow edges, and yellow wheels with red cores, designed for street or park use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose of the skateboard, black grip tape, and yellow deck edge.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the deck, upturned nose and tail, and all four yellow wheels with red cores.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the tail's rounded shape and yellow edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the deck profile and all four wheels.
attribute_wheel_type: street, yellow with red core, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard kingpin trucks, metallic color, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern or graphics
